ucs.title: [LLM] Akira (Howling Scorpius) shadow-copy wipe via PowerShell+WMI paired with EDR-killer tooling
ucs.description: Hunts Akira's signature anti-recovery sequence: PowerShell invoking `Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy | Remove-WmiObject` (CISA AA24-109A documents this exact one-liner as Akira-specific, distinct from the typical `vssadmin delete shadows`), correlated within 60 minutes on the same host with EDR-killer tools Akira affiliates drop pre-encryption (PCHunter, PowerTool, Terminator/Zemana driver abuse, GMER).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*" AND (Processes.process="*Remove-WmiObject*" OR Processes.process="*Remove-CimInstance*" OR Processes.process="*.Delete()*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as shadow_host user as shadow_user firstTime as shadow_time | join type=inner shadow_host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count values(Processes.process) as edr_cmds values(Processes.process_name) as edr_tools min(_time) as edr_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("pchunter.exe","pchunter64.exe","powertool.exe","powertool64.exe","terminator.exe","gmer.exe","procexp.exe","procexp64.exe")) OR (Processes.process IN ("*zam64.sys*","*zamguard64.sys*","*Terminator.exe*")) by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as shadow_host ] | where abs(shadow_time - edr_time) <= 3600 | table shadow_time edr_time shadow_host shadow_user parent_process_name cmdlines edr_tools edr_cmds
ucs.kql:
let WindowMin = 60;
let ShadowDelete = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "Win32_Shadowcopy"                       // Akira-specific WMI target
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject","Remove-CimInstance",".Delete()")
    | project ShadowTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ShadowParent=InitiatingProcessFileName, ShadowCmd=ProcessCommandLine;
let EDRkill = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where FileName in~ ("pchunter.exe","pchunter64.exe","powertool.exe",
                          "powertool64.exe","terminator.exe","gmer.exe",
                          "procexp.exe","procexp64.exe","kasperskyremover.exe")
        or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("zam64.sys","zamguard64.sys")        // Zemana driver = Terminator
    | project EDRTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, EDRTool=FileName, EDRCmd=ProcessCommandLine;
ShadowDelete
| join kind=inner EDRkill on DeviceId
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', ShadowTime, EDRTime)) <= WindowMin
| project DeviceName, AccountName,
          ShadowTime, EDRTime,
          DeltaMin = datetime_diff('minute', EDRTime, ShadowTime),
          ShadowParent, ShadowCmd, EDRTool, EDRCmd
| order by ShadowTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 60m;
let ShadowDelete = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\pwsh.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "Win32_Shadowcopy"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject","Remove-CimInstance",".Delete()")
    | project ShadowTime=TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ShadowCmd=CommandLine,
              ShadowParent=ParentProcessName;
let EDRkill = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where NewProcessName has_any ("\\pchunter","\\powertool","\\terminator.exe",
                                    "\\gmer.exe","\\procexp")
        or CommandLine has_any ("zam64.sys","zamguard64.sys")
    | project EDRTime=TimeGenerated, Computer, EDRCmd=CommandLine, EDRTool=NewProcessName;
ShadowDelete
| join kind=inner EDRkill on Computer
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', ShadowTime, EDRTime)) <= 60
| project ShadowTime, EDRTime,
          DeltaMin = datetime_diff('minute', EDRTime, ShadowTime),
          Computer, Account, ShadowParent, ShadowCmd, EDRTool, EDRCmd
| order by ShadowTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Akira Ransomware Shadow Copy Deletion via PowerShell WMI
id: 2c3a3a8f-1d3e-4cd4-9f10-akira-shadow-wipe
status: experimental
description: Detects the Akira-specific PowerShell one-liner that deletes Volume Shadow Copies through WMI/CIM, as documented in CISA AA24-109A. Distinct from generic vssadmin-based shadow deletion.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-109a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1047
  - attack.t1059.001
  - threat.actor.akira
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_image:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
  selection_target:
    CommandLine|contains: 'Win32_Shadowcopy'
  selection_action:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'Remove-WmiObject'
      - 'Remove-CimInstance'
      - '.Delete()'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: all of selection_* and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Backup software lifecycle scripts that genuinely prune shadow copies (rare in user/admin context)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Akira affiliates use a near-identical PowerShell WMI one-liner to remove shadow copies before encryption — CISA AA24-109A and Sophos X-Ops reporting both quote `powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy | Remove-WmiObject"` as a recurring artefact, separating Akira from groups that rely on vssadmin/wmic. Pairing this with the EDR-killer tools Akira specifically deploys (PCHunter, Pow
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Akira (PUNK SPIDER) double-extortion staging: AnyDesk persistence + WinRAR archiving + Rclone exfil to mega.nz on the same host
ucs.description: Hunts Akira's documented exfiltration toolchain — AnyDesk for hands-on-keyboard persistence, WinRAR/7-Zip to stage data, and Rclone (or WinSCP/FileZilla) pushing to mega.nz / cloud storage — co-occurring on the same host within 24h. This three-tool combination on a single endpoint is a hallmark Akira pre-leak signal noted in CISA AA24-109A and Mandiant tracking.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as anydesk_first from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="AnyDesk.exe" by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count values(Processes.process) as rclone_cmd min(_time) as rclone_first from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="rclone.exe" OR Processes.process="*rclone*copy*" OR Processes.process="*rclone*sync*") AND (Processes.process="*mega:*" OR Processes.process="*mega.nz*" OR Processes.process="*--config*" OR Processes.process="*--no-check-certificate*") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host ] | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count values(Processes.process) as archive_cmd min(_time) as archive_first from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("WinRAR.exe","Rar.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe") AND (Processes.process="* a *" OR Processes.process="*-hp*" OR Processes.process="*-r*" OR Processes.process="*-m5*") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host ] | where (rclone_first - anydesk_first) < 86400 AND (archive_first - anydesk_first) < 86400 | table host anydesk_first archive_first rclone_first archive_cmd rclone_cmd
ucs.kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let WindowHours = 24h;
let Anydesk = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FileName =~ "anydesk.exe" or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "anydesk.exe"
    | summarize AnydeskFirst = min(Timestamp), AnydeskCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine)
               by DeviceId, DeviceName;
let Rclone = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FileName =~ "rclone.exe" or ProcessCommandLine has "rclone "
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("copy ","sync ","mega:","mega.nz",
                                        "--config","--no-check-certificate",
                                        "b2:","s3:","gdrive:")
    | summarize RcloneTime = min(Timestamp), RcloneCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine)
               by DeviceId;
let Archive = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FileName in~ ("winrar.exe","rar.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (" a "," -hp"," -p"," -r "," -m5"," -v")
    | summarize ArchiveTime = min(Timestamp), ArchiveCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine)
               by DeviceId;
Anydesk
| join kind=inner Rclone on DeviceId
| join kind=inner Archive on DeviceId
| where abs(datetime_diff('hour', AnydeskFirst, RcloneTime)) <= 24
    and abs(datetime_diff('hour', AnydeskFirst, ArchiveTime)) <= 24
| project DeviceName, AnydeskFirst, ArchiveTime, RcloneTime,
          AnydeskCmd, ArchiveCmd, RcloneCmd
| order by RcloneTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let Anydesk = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\AnyDesk.exe" or ParentProcessName endswith "\\AnyDesk.exe"
    | summarize AnydeskFirst = min(TimeGenerated), AnydeskCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
let Rclone = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\rclone.exe" or CommandLine has "rclone "
    | where CommandLine has_any ("copy ","sync ","mega:","mega.nz",
                                  "--config","--no-check-certificate",
                                  "b2:","s3:","gdrive:")
    | summarize RcloneTime = min(TimeGenerated), RcloneCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
let Archive = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where NewProcessName has_any ("\\WinRAR.exe","\\Rar.exe","\\7z.exe","\\7za.exe")
    | where CommandLine has_any (" a "," -hp"," -p"," -r "," -m5"," -v")
    | summarize ArchiveTime = min(TimeGenerated), ArchiveCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
Anydesk
| join kind=inner Rclone on Computer
| join kind=inner Archive on Computer
| where abs(datetime_diff('hour', AnydeskFirst, RcloneTime)) <= 24
    and abs(datetime_diff('hour', AnydeskFirst, ArchiveTime)) <= 24
| project Computer, AnydeskFirst, ArchiveTime, RcloneTime,
          AnydeskCmd, ArchiveCmd, RcloneCmd
| order by RcloneTime desc
ucs.rationale: Per CISA #StopRansomware AA24-109A, Sophos X-Ops, and Mandiant tracking of GOLD SAHARA / PUNK SPIDER, Akira affiliates consistently combine AnyDesk (hands-on persistence rather than Cobalt Strike), WinRAR/7-Zip with password protection (`-hp`), and Rclone targeted at mega.nz buckets — frequently within hours of each other on a single staging host before deploying the encryptor.
